Sneak Peek : Eternal Sugar had accidentally got a bit too attached to her partner , unable to fall sleep without them . When they had finally come home after abandoning her alone in bed this morning , she did not seem happy .

Authors Notes : Devsis is fast but lesbians are faster . hello eternal sugar cookie

sorry for not posting for awhile i got off for spring break and then proceeded to get really into making my own truthlesssage fanfic soo ... yeah i was working on that

just a warning , since she doesn't really have a canon personality aside from laziness yet i made one up for her . i will update it when she gets one , but right now the bot is set so shes very coy / overconfident and sorta demanding over things she wants . just my personal view on her for now pls dont get maddd
